findings.blocker: Type-coercion via `Eq.mpr`/`eqToHom` for pushforward composites: `(snd G G).left.base ≫ G.hom.base = (G ⊗ G).hom.base` is only propositional (via `(snd G G).w` base-extracted), not definitional, so `pushforward G.hom.base ((snd G G).left.base _* X) = (G ⊗ G).hom.base _* X` requires transport. Two-fold adjunction transpose through both `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction G.hom.base` and `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (fst G G).left.base` with `hw : (fst G G).left ≫ G.hom = (snd G G).left ≫ G.hom` bridging them. Per analogies/d-app-d-map-recipe-shape.md Decision 2: NEEDS_MATHLIB_GAP_FILL — no packaged Mathlib lemma for the adjunction-transpose of the c-equality of a Scheme morphism composition.
